verses.latin_vulgate: Cæli enarrant gloriam Dei,  et opera manuum ejus annuntiat firmamentum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַשָּׁמַ֗יִם מְֽסַפְּרִ֥ים כְּבֽוֹד־אֵ֑ל וּֽמַעֲשֵׂ֥ה יָ֝דָ֗יו מַגִּ֥יד הָרָקִֽיעַ׃
verses.king_james: The heavens declare the glory of God; and the firmament sheweth his handywork.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dies diei eructat verbum,  et nox nocti indicat scientiam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: י֣וֹם לְ֭יוֹם יַבִּ֣יעַֽ אֹ֑מֶר וְלַ֥יְלָה לְּ֝לַ֗יְלָה יְחַוֶּה־דָּֽעַת׃
verses.king_james: Day unto day uttereth speech, and night unto night sheweth knowledge.

verses.latin_vulgate: Non sunt loquelæ, neque sermones,  quorum non audiantur voces eorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֵֽין־אֹ֭מֶר וְאֵ֣ין דְּבָרִ֑ים בְּ֝לִ֗י נִשְׁמָ֥ע קוֹלָֽם׃
verses.king_james: There is no speech nor language, where their voice is not heard.

verses.latin_vulgate: In omnem terram exivit sonus eorum,  et in fines orbis terræ verba eorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּכׇל־הָאָ֨רֶץ ׀ יָ֘צָ֤א קַוָּ֗ם וּבִקְצֵ֣ה תֵ֭בֵל מִלֵּיהֶ֑ם לַ֝שֶּׁ֗מֶשׁ שָֽׂם־אֹ֥הֶל בָּהֶֽם׃
verses.king_james: Their line is gone out through all the earth, and their words to the end of the world. In them hath he set a tabernacle for the sun,

verses.latin_vulgate: In sole posuit tabernaculum suum ;  et ipse tamquam sponsus procedens de thalamo suo.  Exsultavit ut gigas ad currendam viam ;
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְה֗וּא כְּ֭חָתָן יֹצֵ֣א מֵחֻפָּת֑וֹ יָשִׂ֥ישׂ כְּ֝גִבּ֗וֹר לָר֥וּץ אֹֽרַח׃
verses.king_james: Which is as a bridegroom coming out of his chamber, and rejoiceth as a strong man to run a race.

verses.latin_vulgate: a summo cælo egressio ejus.  Et occursus ejus usque ad summum ejus ;  nec est qui se abscondat a calore ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מִקְצֵ֤ה הַשָּׁמַ֨יִם ׀ מֽוֹצָא֗וֹ וּתְקוּפָת֥וֹ עַל־קְצוֹתָ֑ם וְאֵ֥ין נִ֝סְתָּ֗ר מֵחַמָּתֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: His going forth is from the end of the heaven, and his circuit unto the ends of it: and there is nothing hid from the heat thereof.

verses.latin_vulgate: Lex Domini immaculata, convertens animas ;  testimonium Domini fidele, sapientiam præstans parvulis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: תּ֘וֹרַ֤ת יְהֹוָ֣ה תְּ֭מִימָה מְשִׁ֣יבַת נָ֑פֶשׁ עֵד֥וּת יְהֹוָ֥ה נֶ֝אֱמָנָ֗ה מַחְכִּ֥ימַת פֶּֽתִי׃
verses.king_james: The law of the Lord is perfect, converting the soul: the testimony of the Lord is sure, making wise the simple.

verses.latin_vulgate: Justitiæ Domini rectæ, lætificantes corda ;  præceptum Domini lucidum, illuminans oculos.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: פִּקּ֘וּדֵ֤י יְהֹוָ֣ה יְ֭שָׁרִים מְשַׂמְּחֵי־לֵ֑ב מִצְוַ֥ת יְהֹוָ֥ה בָּ֝רָ֗ה מְאִירַ֥ת עֵינָֽיִם׃
verses.king_james: The statutes of the Lord are right, rejoicing the heart: the commandment of the Lord is pure, enlightening the eyes.

verses.latin_vulgate: Timor Domini sanctus, permanens in sæculum sæculi ;  judicia Domini vera, justificata in semetipsa,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יִרְאַ֤ת יְהֹוָ֨ה ׀ טְהוֹרָה֮ עוֹמֶ֢דֶת לָ֫עַ֥ד מִֽשְׁפְּטֵי־יְהֹוָ֥ה אֱמֶ֑ת צָֽדְק֥וּ יַחְדָּֽו׃
verses.king_james: The fear of the Lord is clean, enduring for ever: the judgments of the Lord are true and righteous altogether.

verses.latin_vulgate: desiderabilia super aurum et lapidem pretiosum multum,  et dulciora super mel et favum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַֽנֶּחֱמָדִ֗ים מִ֭זָּהָב וּמִפַּ֣ז רָ֑ב וּמְתוּקִ֥ים מִ֝דְּבַ֗שׁ וְנֹ֣פֶת צוּפִֽים׃
verses.king_james: More to be desired are they than gold, yea, than much fine gold: sweeter also than honey and the honeycomb.

verses.latin_vulgate: Etenim servus tuus custodit ea ;  in custodiendis illis retributio multa.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: גַּֽם־עַ֭בְדְּךָ נִזְהָ֣ר בָּהֶ֑ם בְּ֝שׇׁמְרָ֗ם עֵ֣קֶב רָֽב׃
verses.king_james: Moreover by them is thy servant warned: and in keeping of them there is great reward.

verses.latin_vulgate: Delicta quis intelligit ?  ab occultis meis munda me ;
verses.king_james: Who can understand his errors? cleanse thou me from secret faults.

verses.latin_vulgate: et ab alienis parce servo tuo.  Si mei non fuerint dominati, tunc immaculatus ero,  et emundabor a delicto maximo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: גַּ֤ם מִזֵּדִ֨ים ׀ חֲשֹׂ֬ךְ עַבְדֶּ֗ךָ אַֽל־יִמְשְׁלוּ־בִ֣י אָ֣ז אֵיתָ֑ם וְ֝נִקֵּ֗יתִי מִפֶּ֥שַֽׁע רָֽב׃
verses.king_james: Keep back thy servant also from presumptuous sins; let them not have dominion over me: then shall I be upright, and I shall be innocent from the great transgression.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et erunt ut complaceant eloquia oris mei,  et meditatio cordis mei in conspectu tuo semper.  Domine, adjutor meus, et redemptor meus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יִ֥הְיֽוּ־לְרָצ֨וֹן ׀ אִמְרֵי־פִ֡י וְהֶגְי֣וֹן לִבִּ֣י לְפָנֶ֑יךָ יְ֝הֹוָ֗ה צוּרִ֥י וְגֹאֲלִֽי׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: Let the words of my mouth, and the meditation of my heart, be acceptable in thy sight, O Lord, my strength, and my redeemer.
